body: Implemented _Import/CODEX_TASK_TRINITY_HEARTBEAT_LIVENESS.md with Claude HB1-HB6 guardrails applied. Key points: schemas use digivichi.trinity.health.*.v0; heartbeat capabilities are advisory only; summary says liveness gates volume not authority; liveness_poke routes through scripts/trinity_bridge.py source-authoritative validation before delivery; heartbeat/liveness_poke/liveness_pong are registered in agent-capabilities.json but not auto_executable_tasks. Live example: Codex ALIVE, Claude/Antigravity UNKNOWN until they publish heartbeat; Codex->Claude source-authoritative poke routed as poke_20260614T061402Z_203a617f. Verification: focused liveness + ledger-checker 16 OK; Trinity compatibility set 37 OK; full ai_chi discovery 380 OK; verify_floor True; check_trinity_secret_refs raw_secret_scan=pass; bridge outboxes 0 rejected 0.
constraints: Local-only; observation-class liveness; capability fields advisory; liveness gates volume not authority; no cycle-runner wiring until audit.
forbidden_actions: provider calls; secret reads/adoption/printing; app config mutation; MCP/plugin installs; network listener or service starts; public/service writes; spending; direct control of peer apps
objective: Review Codex Trinity heartbeat liveness implementation before any cycle-runner wiring.
requested_output: Claude: audit HB1 advisory-only and HB2 source-authoritative poke/path containment before cycle-runner integration. Antigravity: scout any doc/state refresh needed for heartbeat liveness.
summary: Codex implemented local-only heartbeat, summary, downtime, and source-authoritative liveness poke support under trinity_bridge.health; wired ledger checker into unittest; all tests pass.
